- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized illustration shows a white-and-blue haired character portrait with purple eyes and a decorative necklace-like emblem, set against a plain white background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a drawn character’s upper body and face. The character has light blue hair with darker blue shading and flowing strands, with a curved fringe and two side tufts framing the head. Large purple eyes are shown looking forward. The character wears a light-colored top with a blue, glitter-like pattern on the chest area and a central decorative pendant: a gold emblem with a diamond-shaped centerpiece and symmetrical wing-like shapes extending upward and downward.

Setting:
The background is plain white with no visible environment, suggesting a graphic or poster-style illustration rather than a real-world scene.

Visual Details:
The illustration uses clean linework and soft gradients. The hair is predominantly pale blue with darker blue outlines and highlights, and it curls outward near the shoulders. The pendant is gold with a central diamond-like shape outlined in light colors. Lighting is even and flat, typical of digital character art, with no visible shadows beyond the shading in the hair and clothing.

Visible Text:

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up digital drawing of a character with blue hair and purple eyes against a plain white background. It features a blue patterned chest outfit and a prominent gold, diamond-centered pendant.
